cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out between what times Jennifer could have gone to the swimming pool. Thomas saw her walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 9pm to 10pm. 7. The swimming pool was closed after 10pm. So, the question is where can Jennifer have gone to the swimming pool. Then from 12pm to 1pm: library. Then from 1pm to 2pm: buying a bike. Then from 2pm to 9pm: buying a phone. Then 9pm to 10pm: walking towards the Statue of Liberty. The pool is closed after 10pm, so the latest she could have gone is before 10pm.
